reason: Reduced from 40 to 20 packs — 15 free, 5 premium. Duplicates and low-priority packs archived.

phasePacks.name: Phone Case Customization
phasePacks.description: Create and sell custom phone cases with unique designs. Low inventory risk, high margins, creative outlet.
phasePacks.whatThisIs: A custom phone case business where you print or apply designs to blank cases based on customer requests or your own creative designs.
whatYouNeed: Blank phone cases (various models)
Sublimation printer OR vinyl cutter OR UV printer access
Design software (Canva free works)
Heat press (if using sublimation)
Sample cases for display
Packaging materials
Phone model size chart
firstSevenActions: Research most popular phone models in Jamaica
Source blank cases (AliExpress or local wholesale)
Create 10 original designs (Jamaican themes sell well)
Produce 5 sample cases for photos
Set up Instagram shop with product photos
Price cases JMD 1,500-3,000 based on design complexity
Post first product and run small promotion
waitingTimeTasks: Design new collections (holidays, events)
Research trending designs
Find local printing partner if not buying equipment
Create mockup templates for customer previews
Plan collaborations with local artists
phasePacks.salesMode: Instagram and WhatsApp orders. Consider pop-up at markets. Partner with phone repair shops for display.
phasePacks.dailyMinimum: Sell 3 cases at JMD 2,000 average = JMD 6,000 revenue. After costs, JMD 3,000-4,000 profit daily.
commonFailurePoints: Not showing cases on actual phones
Copying designs instead of creating original
exitExpandPaths: Expand to laptop skins and accessories
Wholesale to retailers
License designs to manufacturers
Open kiosk in mall
Launch own phone accessory brand

packLadder.reason: Expand from phone cases to full custom apparel or boost with social media marketing

phasePacks.name: Custom Clothing Prints Heat Transfer
phasePacks.description: Start a custom clothing printing business using heat‑transfer technology. Low startup cost, high demand, flexible schedule.
phasePacks.whatThisIs: A robust Jamaican digital services business focused on Custom Clothing Prints Heat Transfer. Designed for high margins and low overhead in the local market.
phasePacks.whatThisIsNot: Not a franchise. Not a get-rich-quick scheme. Requires consistent effort and excellent customer service.
firstSevenActions: Research the local competition in your parish and identify a gap.
Create your business name and secure social media handles.
Source your initial supplies from local wholesalers or online.
Set up a WhatsApp Business catalog with clear JMD pricing.
Create 3-5 piece of sample work/products and photograph them well.
Announce your launch to immediate friends and family to get first clients.
Post your first piece of content on social media with local hashtags.
waitingTimeTasks: Draft templates for customer inquiries and FAQs.
Research advanced techniques or trends on YouTube.
Build a list of 20 potential B2B or high-value clients.
Design basic branding (logo, business cards) on Canva.
phasePacks.dailyMinimum: To sustain Custom Clothing Prints Heat Transfer, aim for at least 2-3 transactions per day or 1 high-ticket client per week, ensuring daily gross revenue exceeds JMD 5,000.
commonFailurePoints: Undercutting prices and working at a loss.
exitExpandPaths: Hire an assistant to handle basic tasks.
Expand product/service line.
Open a physical storefront or dedicated studio.
Transition to teaching or consulting others in the field.
whatYouNeed: Smartphone with good camera and WhatsApp Business
Basic toolkit or equipment specific to your trade
Initial inventory or supplies (JMD 10,000 - 20,000 worth)
Branded social media presence (Instagram/TikTok)
Reliable transportation or delivery partner (e.g., local bearer)
Notebook for tracking income and expenses
valueAddMenu: Monthly Retainer or Subscription package (15% discount)
phasePacks.salesMode: Highly visual social media marketing on Instagram and TikTok, driving traffic to WhatsApp Business for closing sales and taking deposits.

Create your business name and secure social media handles.
Source your initial supplies from local wholesalers or online.
Set up a WhatsApp Business catalog with clear JMD pricing.

Announce your launch to immediate friends and family to get first clients.
Post your first piece of content on social media with local hashtags.
waitingTimeTasks: Draft templates for customer inquiries and FAQs.

Expand product/service line.
Open a physical storefront or dedicated studio.
Transition to teaching or consulting others in the field.
